src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.general_idea: Remove the ModelMapper library dependency and its associated bean configuration.
src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.human_impl: Removed import org.modelmapper.ModelMapper and the modelMapper() @Bean method.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.general_idea: Add a PasswordEncoder bean using Spring Security's delegating factory to support password hashing.
src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/config/B.human_impl: Added import org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder and a passwordEncoder() @Bean method returning PasswordEncoderFactories.createDelegatingPasswordEncoder().

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/controll.general_idea: Replace manual SLF4J logger instantiation with Lombok's @Slf4j annotation to reduce boilerplate.
Replace explicit constructor injection with Lombok's @RequiredArgsConstructor annotation to reduce boilerplate.
Change the API response from a plain String to a JSON object containing a 'message' field.

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/util/Mes.general_idea: Replace manual private constructor with Lombok @NoArgsConstructor(access = AccessLevel.PRIVATE) to enforce non-instantiability.
Add constant strings for various business validation error messages (faculty, department, sport, feature, member, role).
Add inner class with constants formatted for use in Bean Validation annotations (wrapped in curly braces).
src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/util/Mes.human_impl: public static class AnnotationSupported { ... public static final String INVALID_FACULTY_NAME_SIZE = START + MessagesUtil.INVALID_FACULTY_NAME_SIZE + END; ... }

src/main/java/com/laan/sportsda/util/Pat.general_idea: Added a comprehensive set of string constants for API path segments to centralize URL definitions.
Replaced the manual private constructor with a Lombok annotation to enforce the utility class pattern.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.0.5 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 support and latest features.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 21.
Add MapStruct library for type-safe bean mapping.
Add Lombok-MapStruct binding to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization of JWTs.
Add Spring Security starter to enable security features.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver for database connectivity.
Add Spring Security test support for testing secured endpoints.
Remove ModelMapper dependency in favor of MapStruct.
Configure asciidoctor-maven-plugin with source and output directories for documentation generation.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 21 source/target and annotation processor paths for MapStruct and Lombok.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add SonarQube Maven plugin in pluginManagement for static code analysis.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the logs directory to .gitignore to prevent log files from being tracked in version control.

README.md.general_idea: The project title in the README was changed from a lowercase identifier to a descriptive proper noun.
A brief description of the project's purpose was added to the README.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Enable Spring Boot 3.4+ virtual thread support for improved concurrency on JDK 21.
Configure the active Spring profile via an environment variable for deployment flexibility.
Externalize database username and password to environment variables for security.
Set Hibernate DDL auto-update mode and enable globally quoted identifiers for schema management.
Define JWT secret key source and expiration time for authentication.
Define application-specific constants for roles and default faculty name.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Expanded the master Liquibase changelog to include multiple new table creation scripts for a more complex domain model.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.human_impl: Added include entries for faculty, department, permission, role, member, sport, feature, and related mapping tables.
